hero.sub: With over 15 years of experience, I've worked alongside faith organizations 芒聙聰 from complete rebrands to weekly print materials, curricula, and publishing. I understand the mission, the timeline, and what it takes to communicate it well.

paragraphs: I'm Barbara Soriano, a brand and graphic designer based in Buenos Aires, Argentina, with over 15 years of experience helping churches and Christian organizations communicate with clarity through branding, editorial, print, and digital design.

My design journey began in my local church, where I discovered how thoughtful design can support ministry. Since then, I've worked with churches across the United States and Latin America, creating sermon series, event identities, books, discipleship resources, membership guides, and complete church rebrands.

For three years I was part of the Church Media Squad team, producing weekly creative content for U.S. churches. I've also worked with e625 for more than a decade, designing books, Bibles, curricula, and digital resources for ministries in over 20 countries. I don't just design for churches芒聙聰I understand how they work.
